questions.label: What tech stack do you mainly use?
questions.content: I mainly focus on the Vue.js ecosystem, including Vue.js, Nuxt.js (SSR), Vuex, VueRouter, etc. Familiar with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), skilled in using UI libraries like Naive UI, Element Plus, Ant Design Vue, and Tailwind CSS for styling.

questions.label: Do you have mobile development experience?
questions.content: Yes, I have extensive mobile H5 development experience. I've developed multiple mobile projects using Vue3 + Vant + Vite tech stack, including power bank rental platforms and medical beauty warranty platforms, able to create high-performance and smooth mobile user experiences.

questions.label: Do you use AI tools to assist development?
questions.content: Yes, since 2022 I've been deeply using AI tools (such as ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek) to assist daily development, significantly improving efficiency in code generation, technical solution research, problem localization, and documentation writing.

questions.label: What types of projects have you worked on?
questions.content: I've participated in frontend development for multiple commercial projects, covering cross-border e-commerce platforms, IoT rental platforms, medical beauty trading platforms, headless e-commerce architecture, and more. Both PC projects and mobile H5 and backend management systems.

questions.label: Are you familiar with Server-Side Rendering (SSR)?
questions.content: Yes, I'm proficient in Nuxt.js server-side rendering framework with practical experience in large-scale e-commerce projects. SSR can effectively improve first-screen loading speed and SEO performance.

questions.label: Do you know about headless e-commerce architecture?
questions.content: Yes, I used headless e-commerce architecture in the incam project, using Shopify as the CMS backend management system, fetching data through Storefront API (GraphQL), building frontend pages with Nuxt.js, and deploying through Vercel platform.

questions.label: What do you enjoy most about frontend development?
questions.content: I enjoy transforming designs into interactive user interfaces, implementing functionality through code and optimizing user experience. Especially using modern tools and frameworks to efficiently build responsive and modern user interfaces gives me a great sense of achievement.

questions.label: What are your hobbies outside of work?
questions.content: I like learning new technologies and often improve my skills through personal projects. I also follow the latest trends in the frontend field, reading technical articles and documentation to maintain passion for technology and continuous learning.
